arts.ttl: Real Madrid star limps out of Liverpool clash with injury

arts.ttl: Liverpool flop 'considering retirement' aged 31 after failing to find new club
arts.sum: Ex-Liverpool goalkeeper Loris Karius spent a total of six years at Anfield after arriving under Jurgen Klopp but could be set to quit football at just the age of 31 after a Premier League return

arts.ttl: Photo: Liverpool’s Virgil van Dijk turns Real Madrid star Mbappé into a meme

arts.ttl: What Jude Bellingham did in Anfield tunnel before Liverpool Champions League tie speaks volumes
arts.sum: Jude Bellingham started Real Madrid's Champions League tie against Liverpool at Anfield on Wednesday night

arts.ttl: Real Madrid star targeted with heavy boos and jeers from Liverpool fans
arts.sum: The home support in attendance at Real Madrid’s meeting with Liverpool on Wednesday have wasted little time in making clear their dislike for a leading member of Carlo Ancelotti’s squad.…

arts.ttl: Liverpool icon Luis Suarez makes career decision weeks after Inter Miami heartbreak
arts.sum: Luis Suarez has previously left the door open to rejoining Liverpool, igniting speculation that a move to Anfield could – one day – be on the cards

arts.ttl: 'It sounds like' - Gareth Bale agrees with Rio Ferdinand's Mohamed Salah Liverpool contract theory
arts.sum: Latest Liverpool news as Mohamed Salah's contract discussion continues to split opinion

arts.ttl: Carlo Ancelotti breaks Sir Alex Ferguson Champions League record against Liverpool
arts.sum: Real Madrid manager Carlo Ancelotti is taking charge of his 215th Champions League match tonight, passing former Manchester United boss Sir Alex Ferguson

arts.ttl: Rio Ferdinand defends Mohamed Salah over contract stand-off with Liverpool and insists Egyptian star has NOT 'been disrespectful' to the Merseyside giants
arts.sum: The Egyptian's contract is set to expire at the end of this season and he recently claimed in a shock interview that there are no new offers to stay from Liverpool chiefs.
